title: Atlas of Adaptive Reading
subtitle: A handbook for moving through idea webs instead of static pages
description: A sample AI-generated book about designing nonlinear reading flows, chapter maps, and recall layers for knowledge-heavy content.

title: Field Guide to Quiet Automation
subtitle: Small local systems that help without taking over
description: A second sample book focused on lightweight automation patterns, visible feedback, and keeping local tools understandable.

title: The Fundamentals of LLMs
subtitle: From everyday intuition to production systems
description: A production-minded field guide to large language models, spanning intuition, prompting, retrieval, evaluation, and safety.
